scripts.build:dashboard: bunx vite build packages/dashboard --config packages/dashboard/vite.config.ts && bun --preload ./shims/deno-compat.ts packages/dashboard/scripts/emit-assets.ts
scripts.build:all: bun run build:dashboard && bun run build:sandbox-host
scripts.test: LC_ALL=C bun test packages/common/src && LC_ALL=C bun test packages/cloudflare-compat/src && LC_ALL=C bun test packages/computer-hosts/src && LC_ALL=C bun test packages/sandbox-service/src
